question: Will Jinbaobao's TTM tin production fall below 80 kt on May 31, 2026?
textDescription:
Resolves YES if Jinbaobao's trailing twelve months (TTM) tin production reported in official company disclosures or credible industry sources is below 80,000 tonnes on May 31, 2026. The primary resolution data will come from Jinbaobao's production reports or verified industry publications such as the International Tin Association or USGS updates. Given Jinbaobao's recent export ban affecting about 12% of global tin supply, production levels near this threshold will critically influence global tin availability and pricing. Only primary tin production counts; recycled or refined volumes are excluded.

Jinbaobao's sudden tin export ban, covering 12% of global supply, significantly tightens the market, influencing pricing and availability.

Source: Article
